mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trainer ( user_id, description, address, address_detail, postcode, latitude, longitude, approval_status ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{description}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{postcode}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, 'PENDING' )
mapper.update: UPDATE trainer SET description = #{description}, address = #{address}, address_detail = #{addressDetail}, postcode = #{postcode}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, trainer_type = #{trainerType}, gym_id = #{gymId}, business_registration_num = #{businessRegistrationNum} WHERE id = #{trainerId}
mapper.select: SELECT t.id AS trainerId, t.user_id AS userId, t.trainer_type AS trainerType, t.gym_id AS gymId, t.business_registration_num AS businessRegistrationNum, t.description, t.address, t.address_detail AS addressDetail, t.postcode, t.latitude, t.longitude, t.approval_status AS approvalStatus, t.is_verified AS isVerified, u.name, u.email FROM trainer t JOIN `user` u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND u.role = 'TRAINER' AND u.is_deleted = false
SELECT type FROM trainer_specialization WHERE trainer_id = #{trainerId}
SELECT type FROM trainer_traits WHERE trainer_id = #{trainerId}
SELECT id FROM gym WHERE gym_code = #{gymCode}
SELECT id, name, gym_code AS gymCode, address, address_detail AS addressDetail, postcode, latitude, longitude FROM gym WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE `user` SET profile_image = #{fileName} WHERE id = (SELECT user_id FROM trainer WHERE id = #{trainerId})
UPDATE trainer SET approval_status = 'PENDING' WHERE id = #{trainerId}
